title_en: Eric Schmidt: AI Is Already Reshaping Warfare, and China Is Closer Than You Think
dek_en: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt argues in a conversation with Tom Shanker that Ukraine has revealed the future of drone-dominated warfare, that China has closed the AI gap to roughly six months, and that traditional programming is functionally over.
title_zh: 埃里克·施密特：AI 正在重塑战争，中国比你想象的更接近
dek_zh: 谷歌前 CEO 埃里克·施密特在与汤姆·尚克的对话中指出，乌克兰已揭示无人机主导战争的未来，中国已将 AI 差距缩小至约六个月，传统编程实际上已走到尽头。
